emails.product: Portable Radio Case (Motorola APX Series), Duty Style Double Mag Pouch 9/40, ASP Handcuff Case, Flashlight Case (Bezel Down)
emails.shortDescription: Four product roundup on the 'most trusted duty gear' theme. Category level hero (no model in headline), 2x2 grid, each product with its real USP + a broad fitment line + its own Shop Now, mount + 8 finish note, brand trust bar (1,800+ departments, 4.9 stars, made in the USA). Client feedback applied: no Kydex (low profile ruggedized cases), case/pouch never carrier, no model in headline, broad fitment on every card, no pricing, no warranty, full name Zero9 Holsters.
emails.notes: Client brief Jul 14 (theme + 4 products, remember client feedback). All 4 product pages + images verified 200. Approved in Slack Jul 14. Closing CTA 'Square Away Your Loadout' kept per client Q&A.
emails.creativeDirection: Zero9 black #0A0A0A / panel #111418 / red #E62826. Red rule + centered officer hero (banner1_2), 2x2 product grid (APX6000BLK_1 / DMP_1 / ASPV2Blk / BD-2BLK), mount+finish note, trust bar, closing CTA, logo footer.

emails.theme: Welcome 1 of 3: Welcome to Zero9 Holsters
emails.product: Brand story / welcome (Duty Gear That Works)
emails.shortDescription: Zero9 Holsters welcome flow email 1. Two officer hero banner, Welcome to Zero9 Holsters eyebrow, DUTY GEAR THAT WORKS hero, By Cops For Cops brand story, loadout banner, trust bar (Law Enforcement Owned, Made in the USA, Custom Duty Gear). No offer in the flow, plain Shop CTAs. Copy taken from the Zero9 site.
emails.notes: Welcome flow (not a dated send). Client brief Jul 8 + attached layout screenshot. No offer in flow. Copy from zero9holsters.com. Officer lifestyle images from the site (banner1_2, banner2_2). Brand name always Zero9 Holsters. No warranty mention. Approved Jul 8.
emails.creativeDirection: Zero9 black #0A0A0A / white / red #E62826. Two officer hero (banner1_2), Welcome to Zero9 Holsters eyebrow, DUTY GEAR THAT WORKS hero, By Cops For Cops section, loadout banner (banner2_2), trust bar. Officer images .webp, export JPG/PNG for send.

emails.theme: Welcome 2 of 3: Built to Win the Fight + Start Your Loadout

emails.shortDescription: Zero9 Holsters welcome flow email 2. No offer, plain Shop CTAs. Distinct banner from Email 1.
emails.notes: Welcome flow (not a dated send). Banner different from Email 1 (GEAR_DESIGNED_2). CTA reads Shop Now (no best-sellers). Callout image GEAR_DESIGNED_1. Three to start: Portable Radio Case, Duty Style Double Mag Pouch (DMP_1), Body Cam Case. Images verified 200. .avif banners, export JPG/PNG for send. Approved Jul 8.
emails.creativeDirection: Zero9 black/white/red. GEAR_DESIGNED_2 hero + Shop Now, Built to Win the Fight callout (GEAR_DESIGNED_1), three case cards (Radio Case APX6000BLK, Magazine Pouches DMP_1, Body Cam Case EXOBlk) each Shop Now.

Duty Gear brand banner, Zero9 Holsters is law enforcement owned mission, three real five-star reviews (Traditional 9/40 Double Mag Case, K9 E-Collar Remote Case Dogtra, Duty Style Triple Mag Pouch 9/40) each with product + image, closing gear image and Stay Mission Ready close. No offer, plain Shop CTAs.
emails.notes: Welcome flow (not a dated send). Three real reviews supplied by client Jul 8 (Judge.me not machine-accessible, none invented). Banner and end image distinct from Emails 1 and 2. Brand name Zero9 Holsters. Products/images verified 200. Approved Jul 8.
emails.creativeDirection: Zero9 black/white/red. Duty Gear brand banner (IMG_1207), mission copy, three review cards (Traditional 9/40 Double Mag Case IMG_3936, K9 E-Collar Remote Case Dogtra DogtraArc_2, Duty Style Triple Mag Pouch 9/40 Triple_Mag_1), closing gear image (Bodyworn_2), Stay Mission Ready close.

emails.product: Standard Handcuff Case (fits most standard hinged or chain handcuffs, non ASP)
emails.shortDescription: Feature the Standard Handcuff Case, built to the client's attached layout (Bleu de Chanel editorial reference: dark hero with big word + ghosted repeat, numbered 01/02/03 callouts, 4 numbered feature cards with buttons, image strip, closing CTA, full bleed panel, logo footer). Rewritten in Zero9 functional/spec voice. Molded Kydex; Standard or Double Standard; Tek-Lok (duty belt) or Molle-Loks (MOLLE vest); eight finishes. No pricing, no warranty.
emails.notes: Client brief Jul 8 + exact-layout PNG (Bleu de Chanel). Product verified live + in stock via .js 2026-07-08 (all variants available). 6 images 200. Fits most standard hinged/chain non-ASP cuffs; oversized/leg-iron blades and old small Peerless do not fit. Layout replicated in Zero9 black/white/red, functional voice.
emails.creativeDirection: Replicate attached Bleu de Chanel editorial layout in Zero9 black #0A0A0A / white / red #E62826. Big word hero (CUFF CASE) with ghosted repeats, NewCuffs hero, outlined Shop Now, FIT AND HOLD section with StdCuffBlk + 01/02/03 callouts, BUILD YOURS section with CuffColors + 4 numbered feature cards (Fit/Finishes/Mounting/Single or Double) each with Shop Now, ON DUTY 4-up image strip, closing statement + red Shop Now, full-bleed NewCuffs panel, logo footer.

emails.theme: New Arrival: Body Cam Case for EXO / ARGUS
emails.product: Body Cam Case - EXO/ARGUS (fits Utility/Coreforce EXO, Kustom Signals ARGUS, LensLock Eagle 13)
emails.shortDescription: Product launch for the new Body Cam Case. Ruggedized protection vs magnet mounts; three mount options (Tek-Lok duty belt, Molle-Loks vest/pack, Shirt Pocket UltiClips); eight colorways. Functional Zero9 voice, no pricing, no warranty mention. Hero EXOBlk.jpg + real ColorID swatch chart.
emails.notes: Client brief Jul 6. Product verified live + in stock via .js 2026-07-06 (all variants available). Images 200. Fits standalone EXO platform, not cell-phone-based systems. Colors: Black, OD Green, Ranger Green, Coyote, FDE, Silver Tan, Wolf Grey, Basketweave.
emails.creativeDirection: Zero9 black/red aesthetic, Tomorrow/DM Sans fallback. New Arrival eyebrow, EXOBlk hero, Shop Now CTA first half, Built to Fit compatibility list, 3-col mount options, colorways with real ColorID chart, second Shop Now, Handcrafted Cleveland + 4.9 star trust bar. Distinct layout from Jul 4 bundle.

emails.theme: Happy 4th of July: Build Your Bundle & Save 10%
emails.product: Build Your Bundle (Radio Cases, Flashlight Cases, Body Cam Cases; excludes Swag + Tacvent 2.0)
emails.shortDescription: 4th of July / 250 years. Promote the homepage Build Your Bundle & Save 10% module: add at least 3 cases, save 10%, excludes Swag and Tacvent 2.0. GIF walkthrough of the homepage section + numbered steps, category cards (Radio/Flashlight/Body Cam). Functional voice, no pricing, no warranty.
emails.notes: Client brief Jul 2 + homepage screenshot. Bundle builder on homepage. Add at least 3 to fill bundle. Offer excludes Swag + Tacvent 2.0. DESIGNER: embed short GIF screen-recording of the homepage bundle walkthrough.
emails.offerCode: Build Your Bundle: add 3+ cases, save 10%. Excludes Swag + Tacvent 2.0.
emails.creativeDirection: Zero9 black/red/blue, functional voice. Patriotic stripe, measured 250th hero, red 10% OFF bundle block, GIF walkthrough + 4 numbered steps, 3 category cards, Handcrafted Cleveland + 4.9 stars trust bar. No pricing, no warranty.
